name: claude-manager
description: ✨ Claude Code, one click closer. Browse sessions, skills, slash commands, hooks, MCP servers, and agents from your VS Code sidebar. Resume with git branch detection. 100% local, zero telemetry.

enumDescriptions: Open terminals in the editor area (beside current editor)
Open terminals in the bottom panel
claudeManager.terminal.location.description: Where to open Claude terminals when resuming sessions.

enumDescriptions: Open in the active editor group
Open in the first editor group
Open in the second editor group
Open in the third editor group
claudeManager.terminal.editorPosition.description: Which editor group to open the terminal in (only applies when location is 'editor').

enumDescriptions: Show sessions from the past week
Show sessions from the past month
claudeManager.sessions.defaultFilter.description: Default date filter when opening the sessions tab.

enumDescriptions: Show only sessions from the current workspace
claudeManager.sessions.defaultProject.description: Default project filter when opening the sessions tab.

claudeManager.sessions.restoreWindowMinu.description: Time window (in minutes) for Restore Workspace — sessions active within this window are grouped together.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview && npm run build:css
scripts.watch: npm run build:extension -- --watch & npm run build:webview -- --watch
scripts.release: npm test && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').readdirSync('dist').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.vsix')).forEach(f=>require('fs').unlinkSync('dist/'+f))" && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies -o dist/
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run release
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run release
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run release
